Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x4688 "NIGHTMISSIONPINBALL-4688" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Night Mission Pinball (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Various patches to allow the game to run properly: Patch $094A from JSR $0F80 to JMP $0975 (skips disk drive access) NOP out BMI $10D6 at $10D9 NOP out BNE $11A7 at $11AD NOP out BEQ $8ACE at $8ACE
